name: Arizona's Finest Pawnshop
description_short: Arizona EZ-Pawn operates two locations in Sun City and Peoria offering fast pawn loans, gold and jewelry buying, repairs, and firearms sales with a stated 13% introductory interest rate.
description_long:
Arizona EZ-Pawn has been operating since 2010 as a pawn shop serving the Sun City and Peoria communities in Arizona. The company positions itself as 'Arizona's Finest Pawnshop' and emphasizes a customer-focused approach built on over a decade of local presence. They maintain two physical locations with dedicated phone lines and support staff.

The company offers a comprehensive range of pawn services including instant cash loans secured by collateral, buying and selling of gold and jewelry, watch repairs and battery replacement, jewelry cleaning and repair services, and firearms and ammunition sales. They advertise a promotional 13% interest rate for the first 13 days of pawn loans. Arizona EZ-Pawn also maintains an active eBay storefront for online shopping and has developed a mobile app for customer convenience.

Arizona EZ-Pawn distinguishes itself through several specific claims: white-glove customer service with personalized attention, free jewelry cleaning for customers, expert repair services performed by skilled professionals, and convenient multi-channel access including physical locations, eBay, and mobile app shopping. The company emphasizes fair pricing and friendly service as core brand values.

As a pawn shop, Arizona EZ-Pawn provides collateral-based lending rather than unsecured credit products. Customers should understand that pawn loans require surrendering physical items as security, and failure to repay results in loss of the pledged property. While the 13% promotional rate applies to the first 13 days, the standard interest rate for the full loan term is not disclosed on their website. This is a legitimate pawn operation best suited for customers needing immediate cash who possess items of value they're willing to use as collateral.
pros: 13% introductory interest rate for first 13 days of pawn loans, lower than many competitors
Two convenient locations in Sun City and Peoria with separate phone lines for direct access
Free jewelry cleaning service included for customers
Expert in-house repair services for jewelry, watches, and other items
Multi-channel access: physical stores, eBay marketplace, and mobile app
Long operating history since 2010 with established community presence
Comprehensive services beyond pawning including buy/sell operations and firearms sales
cons: Standard interest rate (after promotional 13-day period) not disclosed on website
Limited to two physical locations serving only Sun City and Peoria areas
Collateral-based lending means customers risk losing pledged items if unable to repay
No information provided about loan limits, repayment terms, or renewal options
No transparent fee structure published for non-promotional loan periods
best_for: Arizona residents in Sun City or Peoria needing immediate cash for unexpected expenses
Individuals with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, firearms) willing to use as collateral
People seeking to buy discounted gold, jewelry, electronics, or collectibles
Customers needing jewelry, watch, or specialty item repair services
diagnosis: Arizona EZ-Pawn is best for Arizona residents in Sun City or Peoria who own valuable items and need fast cash, understanding that pawn loans require surrendering collateral and carry interest charges. The main caveat is that the advertised 13% rate only applies to the first 13 days; the full-term interest rate and complete fee structure are not disclosed on their website, making it essential to confirm costs before pledging items.
services: Instant cash pawn loans secured by collateral
Mobile app for browsing and transactions

places_enrichment.formatted_address: 8340 W Peoria Ave, Peoria, AZ 85345, USA
places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 8340 W Peoria Ave, Peoria, AZ 85345, USA

reviews.author: Remy Halaby
reviews.text: Had a great time enquiring firearms and music equipment. Customer service is top notch and I felt very welcome. Will be doing business in the future for sure

reviews.author: Yvonne Cook
reviews.text: This is by far the nicest pawn shop I've ever been to! The service is top notch.  All the crew are friendly & welcoming. The atmosphere is bright & clean, very well organized and everything is labeled clearly. They have a great layaway,  and very fair prices.  Everything they sell is well taken care of and clean, unlike most pawn shops. I definitely don't get the feeling of being "shady" like a lot of other shops. I never expected a pawn shop to feel like a regular store with great service, but Arizona's Finest Pawn Shop managed to do it!

reviews.author: Esperanza Chairez
reviews.text: Definitely my favorite pawn shop! Alicia and Vanessa were super helpful. I've been to so many pawn shops looking for jewelry, and a few other things. They were able to give me options and help me out with a layaway plan. 10/10 will definitely be back!

reviews.author: Amanda Julian
reviews.text: I have been to to Arizonas  finest three times to pawn items! They made the process painless!! Quick, courteous and Painless!!! All three very important to me! Josh and team work amazingly well together very fluid and accurate!! In the event you find your self needing to pawn something , valuables, jewelry or a gun this is the place they give you fair prices and no hassle!! Corner of 83rd Ave and Peoria!! Arizonas  finest pawn shop! Right now 13 days for just 13%

reviews.author: Kaitlyn Cummins
reviews.text: Haven’t been to many for myself however if you need a pawn shop this is the place to go. Easy quick and professional. Not to mention the payment was nice. Desiree and Vanessa will take care of you!
